item.title:
Score_Beo: Score Beo @Score_Beo · 5min Some Good News Below
We chatted with a lot of Fantasy users on what new features they want.
item.description:
Score Beo @Score_Beo · 5min Some Good News Below
We chatted with a lot of Fantasy users on what new features they want.
Version 2 is now Live. It includes:
-Users can now click and view other teams. -Subs will automatically replace a starter who got 0 points -Users can see who the teams that their Mostrar más 1 1 133

item.title:
Score_Beo: Score Beo @Score_Beo · 3min En respuesta a @Score_Beo Few people asking the questions
Game weeks run every week. 2 fre
item.description:
Score Beo @Score_Beo · 3min En respuesta a @Score_Beo Few people asking the questions
Game weeks run every week. 2 free subs per week. Any more subs will cost -4 points.
Any other questions/feedback feel free to comment below/message in DM’s we will reply. 79

item.title: clubber: Clubber @clubber · 5min We are LIVE from Cusack Park for the Preliminary Round of the @MunsterCamogie Senior Hurling C

clubber: Clubber @clubber · 10min Quick turnaround for @KilkennyCLG
